name: ultralight-launch-web
description: Launch-focused Galactic home for conjuring and operating persistent private Agents.

scripts.build: npm run generate:og && tsc && vite build && npm run verify:pages-output
scripts.build:staging: npm run generate:og && tsc && vite build --mode staging && npm run verify:pages-output
scripts.build:production: npm run generate:og && tsc && vite build --mode production && npm run verify:pages-output
scripts.pages:deploy:staging: npm run build:staging && pnpm dlx wrangler@4.67.0 pages deploy dist --project-name ultralight-launch-web --branch staging
scripts.pages:deploy:production: npm run build:production && pnpm dlx wrangler@4.67.0 pages deploy dist --project-name ultralight-launch-web --branch main
